feed-sack-brigandine: TRUE chunky pixel art inventory icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. No Character, duck body, scene, shadow, glow, sparks, particles, text, watermark, UI frame, or transparency.
